title: Senior Backend Engineer - Payments Platform
description:
We are building the next-generation payments infrastructure that will process billions of transactions. We need a senior backend engineer who can architect and build high-throughput, fault-tolerant microservices. You will be responsible for designing APIs that serve millions of concurrent users with sub-100ms latency.

You will work with a world-class team on challenging distributed systems problems. Our stack involves Python/FastAPI, Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL, and Kubernetes on AWS.

The ideal candidate has deep experience in building payment systems, understands financial transaction processing, and is obsessed with reliability and security.

title: AI/ML Engineer - Recommendation Systems
description:
Join our AI team to build world-class recommendation and personalization systems for 50M+ shoppers. You'll develop real-time ML pipelines, train and deploy large-scale models, and collaborate with product teams to deliver measurable business impact.

We use PyTorch, TensorFlow, Spark, Kafka, and MLflow. Our team publishes research and contributes to open-source. We expect candidates to have strong fundamentals in ML, experience with production model serving, and the ability to communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders.
hidden_requirements: Experience with A/B testing at scale

title: Frontend Architect - Design System
description:
We're looking for a Frontend Architect to lead the design and development of our core design system and component library used by 15 product teams. You will define frontend standards, mentor engineers, and ensure consistent, accessible, and high-performance UI across our entire product suite.

Deep expertise in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS is essential. Experience with micro-frontend architectures, WebAssembly for performance-critical components, and web accessibility standards is highly valued.
hidden_requirements: Has led a design system team

title: Cloud Platform Engineer - Site Reliability
description:
We need a Platform/SRE Engineer who can own reliability, scalability, and observability of our cloud-native infrastructure. You will build and maintain Kubernetes clusters, implement GitOps workflows, and drive our zero-downtime deployment strategy.

Strong hands-on skills with Kubernetes, Terraform, Prometheus/Grafana, and at least one major cloud (AWS preferred) are required. Experience with chaos engineering and SLO-based reliability is a huge plus.

title: Engineering Manager - Full Stack Platform
description:
We're scaling fast and need an experienced Engineering Manager to lead a team of 15+ engineers across backend, frontend, and data. You will drive technical strategy, manage hiring, grow engineers, and partner with product and design leadership to ship high-impact features.

This is not an individual contributor role. We expect strong people management skills, a track record of building and retaining engineering teams, and the ability to make architectural decisions while staying close to the code.
